MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-21-589767 WITH CASE CGC-20-585424
Off Calendar Jun-06-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPPEARANCES:
Tara Macomber, 415.323.0946 of Open Door Legal appearing via Zoom for Plaintiff Veronica Perez.
Angleic Senior, 415.278.9400 of Phillips, Spallas & Angstad LLP appearing via Zoom for Defenddan Jaqcqueline Rodriguez.

Argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT JACQUELINE RODRIGUEZ'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-21-589767 WITH CASE CGC-20-585424 is DENIED as to consolidation for all purposes. The matters are already consolidated for trial. Moving party fails to cite any authority for the proposition that the two cases where parties are not identical may be consolidated for all purposes. Veronica Perez is not a party to CGC-21-589767 per the Court records. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)

MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-21-589767 WITH CASE CGC-20-585424
Off Calendar May-23-2022 Continued To Jun-06-22 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Anjelica C. Senior; Phillips, Spallas & Angstadt LLP; 415-278-9400; appearing via Zoom on behalf of defendant Jacqueline Rodriguez.

No other appearences. Court staff explains to counsel that the motion was improperly calendared due to a clerical error and that the motion will need to be continued in order to allow the court to review the motion. Counsel agrees to continue the matter to June 6, 2022. The court rules as follows:

DEFENDANT JACQUELINE RODRIGUEZ'S NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE CASE NOs CGC-20-585424 & CGC-21-589767 FOR ALL PURPOSES is continued to June 6, 2022 at 9:30 a.m. in Department 501. Counsel for the moving party to give notice of new hearing date.

Judge: Vedica Puri; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jan-26-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Angelica Senior, 415-278-9400 of Phillips, Spallas & Angstadt, LLP appearing via Zoom for Defendant Jacqueline Rodriguez.
Frederick Sheinfield, 415-554-3872, deputy City Attorney appearing viz Zoom for Cross-Defendant City and County of San Francisco.
Vivian Co, 415-323-0946, of Open Door Legal appearing via Zoom for Plaintiff Veronica Perez.
James Millar, 415-981-8100 of Millar Law Firm APLC appearing via Zoom for Plaintiff Jacqueline Rodriguez in the consolidated case CGC-21-589767.

Argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: CROSS DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is GRANTED. The government claims filed by Defendant/Cross-Complainant in 2019 are inadequate to support the cross-complaint for indemnity. The time period in which Defendant/Cross-Complainant could have filed a claim has expired. Therefore Defendant/Cross-Complainant did not exhaust their administrative remedies and the cross-complaint is dismissed with prejudice. Order submitted for review. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)
